Step 0A: The longest acceptable answer is: 'My mother used to tell me to hide my face when I spoke to the media because at my age I should be in purdah and she was afraid for my safety.' (117 characters). 1.3 × 117 = 152.1, 117 + 50 = 167. So, character_limit = 167.

Step 0C: 117 < 167, so the highlight is within the limit.
